jsonLd.title: Marketplace Manager - Wrogn - Multiple Openings
jsonLd.description:
Grow your career with Wrogn! We are hiring a Marketplace Manager for our Dhanbad team. Be part of a workplace that celebrates innovation, diversity, and performance.

About Wrogn:
Wrogn is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Optimize product pages for search visibility and conversion
• Manage product listings, pricing, and promotions on the platform
• Create engaging content for product pages and social media
• Manage email marketing campaigns and push notifications
• Conduct competitor analysis and market benchmarking
• Execute digital marketing campaigns across Google, Meta, and other channels
• Build and maintain affiliate and influencer marketing programs

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• MBBS / MD / MS from recognized medical college
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in A/B Testing
• Proficiency in Retention Marketing
• Proficiency in Digital Marketing
• Proficiency in Influencer Marketing
• Proficiency in Data Analytics
• Proficiency in Customer Segmentation
• Proficiency in Supply Chain
• Proficiency in MS Excel

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Referral bonus program
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Dhanbad, Jharkhand, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Wrogn!
